---
title: "Qualitative data analysis"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

## Data context themes
### Data wrangling lecture A

Read in data
```{r}
mines_reviews_og <- read_csv(
  here(
    "data", 
    "02-independent-reviews",
    "hw-context-reasons-themes-Mine-lec-a.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) 

mines_reviews <- mines_reviews_og|> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |> 
  select(-contains("notes")) |> 
  rename(ds_context1_theme_mine = ds_context1_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context2_theme_mine = ds_context2_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context3_theme_mine = ds_context3_theme) |> 
  rename(nonspecific_theme_mine = nonspecific_theme)
  

cats_reviews_og <- read_csv(
  here(
    "data", 
    "02-independent-reviews", 
    "hw-context-reasons-themes-Catalina.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) 

cats_reviews <- cats_reviews_og|> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |> 
  select(-contains("notes")) |> 
  rename(ds_context1_theme_cat = ds_context1_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context2_theme_cat = ds_context2_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context3_theme_cat = ds_context3_theme) |> 
  rename(nonspecific_theme_cat = nonspecific_theme)
```

Merge certain columns into one data frame
```{r}
lec_a_reviews <- mines_reviews |> 
  full_join(cats_reviews) |> 
  arrange(assignment_id) |>
  mutate(ds_context1_theme_resolved = case_when(
    ds_context1_theme_cat == ds_context1_theme_mine ~ ds_context1_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |> 
  mutate(ds_context2_theme_resolved = case_when(
    ds_context2_theme_cat == ds_context2_theme_mine ~ ds_context2_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  mutate(ds_context3_theme_resolved = case_when(
    ds_context3_theme_cat == ds_context3_theme_mine ~ ds_context3_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  mutate(nonspecific_theme_resolved = case_when(
    nonspecific_theme_cat == nonspecific_theme_mine ~ nonspecific_theme_cat,
    nonspecific_theme_cat == "no info" & is.na(nonspecific_theme_mine) ~ "no info",
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  filter(section == "A") |> 
  select( 
    "assignment_id",
    "random_id",
    "hw",
    "section",
    "choice",
    "context",
    "context_q1_response",
    "context_q2_response",
    "context_q3_response",
    "ds_context1_theme_cat",
    "ds_context1_theme_mine",
    "ds_context1_theme_resolved",
    "ds_context2_theme_cat",
    "ds_context2_theme_mine",
    "ds_context2_theme_resolved",
    "ds_context3_theme_cat",
    "ds_context3_theme_mine",
    "ds_context3_theme_resolved",
    "nonspecific_theme_cat",
    "nonspecific_theme_mine",
    "nonspecific_theme_resolved"
  )

write_csv(lec_a_reviews, here("data", "03-cleaned-data", "combined-reviews-lec-a.csv"))
```

### Data wrangling lecture B

Read in data
```{r}
mines_reviews_og <- read_csv(
  here(
    "data", 
    "02-independent-reviews", 
    "hw-context-reasons-themes-Mine-lec-b.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) 

mines_reviews <- mines_reviews_og|> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |> 
  select(-contains("notes")) |> 
  rename(ds_context1_theme_mine = ds_context1_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context2_theme_mine = ds_context2_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context3_theme_mine = ds_context3_theme) |> 
  rename(nonspecific_theme_mine = nonspecific_theme)
  

cats_reviews_og <- read_csv(
  here(
    "data", 
    "02-independent-reviews",
    "hw-context-reasons-themes-Catalina.csv"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) 

cats_reviews <- cats_reviews_og|> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |> 
  select(-contains("notes")) |> 
  rename(ds_context1_theme_cat = ds_context1_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context2_theme_cat = ds_context2_theme) |> 
  rename(ds_context3_theme_cat = ds_context3_theme) |> 
  rename(nonspecific_theme_cat = nonspecific_theme)
```

Merge certain columns into one data frame
```{r}
lec_b_reviews <- mines_reviews |> 
  full_join(cats_reviews) |> 
  arrange(assignment_id) |>
  mutate(ds_context1_theme_resolved = case_when(
    ds_context1_theme_cat == ds_context1_theme_mine ~ ds_context1_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |> 
  mutate(ds_context2_theme_resolved = case_when(
    ds_context2_theme_cat == ds_context2_theme_mine ~ ds_context2_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  mutate(ds_context3_theme_resolved = case_when(
    ds_context3_theme_cat == ds_context3_theme_mine ~ ds_context3_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  mutate(nonspecific_theme_resolved = case_when(
    nonspecific_theme_cat == nonspecific_theme_mine ~ nonspecific_theme_cat,
    nonspecific_theme_cat == "no info" & is.na(nonspecific_theme_mine) ~ "no info",
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  filter(section == "B") |> 
  select( 
    "assignment_id",
    "random_id",
    "hw",
    "section",
    "choice",
    "context",
    "context_q1_response",
    "context_q2_response",
    "context_q3_response",
    "ds_context1_theme_cat",
    "ds_context1_theme_mine",
    "ds_context1_theme_resolved",
    "ds_context2_theme_cat",
    "ds_context2_theme_mine",
    "ds_context2_theme_resolved",
    "ds_context3_theme_cat",
    "ds_context3_theme_mine",
    "ds_context3_theme_resolved",
    "nonspecific_theme_cat",
    "nonspecific_theme_mine",
    "nonspecific_theme_resolved"
  ) |> 
  arrange(hw, context, random_id)

write_csv(lec_b_reviews, here("data", "03-cleaned-data", "combined-reviews-lec-b.csv"))
```
## Choice themes 

### Lecture A

```{r}
choice_reviews_cat_og <- read_csv(
  here("data", "02-independent-reviews", "survey-choice-themes-Cat.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

choice_reviews_mine_og <- read_csv(
  here("data", "02-independent-reviews", "survey-choice-themes-Mine.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

choice_reviews_mine <- choice_reviews_mine_og |> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |>
  select(-contains("nonspecific")) |> 
  rename(negative_theme_mine = negative_theme) |> 
  rename(impartial_theme_mine = impartial_theme) |> 
  rename(positive_theme_mine = positive_theme)

choice_reviews_cat <- choice_reviews_cat_og |> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |>
  select(-contains("nonspecific")) |> 
  rename(negative_theme_cat = negative_theme) |> 
  rename(impartial_theme_cat = impartial_theme) |> 
  rename(positive_theme_cat = positive_theme)
```

```{r}
choice_reviews_lec_a <- choice_reviews_mine |> 
  full_join(choice_reviews_cat) |> 
  arrange(random_id) |>
  mutate(negative_theme_resolved = case_when(
    negative_theme_cat == negative_theme_mine ~ negative_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |> 
  mutate(impartial_theme_resolved = case_when(
    impartial_theme_cat == impartial_theme_mine ~ impartial_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  mutate(positive_theme_resolved = case_when(
    positive_theme_cat == positive_theme_mine ~ positive_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  filter(section == "A") |> 
  select( 
    "random_id",
    "section",
    "student_response",
    "negative_theme_cat",
    "negative_theme_mine",
    "negative_theme_resolved",
    "impartial_theme_cat",
    "impartial_theme_mine",
    "impartial_theme_resolved",
    "positive_theme_cat",
    "positive_theme_mine",
    "positive_theme_resolved"
  )

write_csv(choice_reviews_lec_a, here("data", "03-joint-reviews", "combined-choice-reviews-lec-a.csv"))
```



### Lecture B

```{r}
choice_reviews_cat_og <- read_csv(
  here("data", "02-independent-reviews", "survey-choice-themes-Cat.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

choice_reviews_mine_og <- read_csv(
  here("data", "02-independent-reviews", "survey-choice-themes-Mine.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

choice_reviews_mine <- choice_reviews_mine_og |> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |>
  select(-contains("nonspecific")) |> 
  rename(negative_theme_mine = negative_theme) |> 
  rename(impartial_theme_mine = impartial_theme) |> 
  rename(positive_theme_mine = positive_theme)

choice_reviews_cat <- choice_reviews_cat_og |> 
  select(-contains("reason")) |>
  select(-contains("nonspecific")) |> 
  rename(negative_theme_cat = negative_theme) |> 
  rename(impartial_theme_cat = impartial_theme) |> 
  rename(positive_theme_cat = positive_theme)
```

```{r}
choice_reviews_lec_b <- choice_reviews_mine |> 
  full_join(choice_reviews_cat) |> 
  arrange(random_id) |>
  mutate(negative_theme_resolved = case_when(
    negative_theme_cat == negative_theme_mine ~ negative_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |> 
  mutate(impartial_theme_resolved = case_when(
    impartial_theme_cat == impartial_theme_mine ~ impartial_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  mutate(positive_theme_resolved = case_when(
    positive_theme_cat == positive_theme_mine ~ positive_theme_cat,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )) |>
  filter(section == "B") |> 
  select( 
    "random_id",
    "section",
    "student_response",
    "negative_theme_cat",
    "negative_theme_mine",
    "negative_theme_resolved",
    "impartial_theme_cat",
    "impartial_theme_mine",
    "impartial_theme_resolved",
    "positive_theme_cat",
    "positive_theme_mine",
    "positive_theme_resolved"
  )

write_csv(choice_reviews_lec_b, here("data", "03-joint-reviews", "combined-choice-reviews-lec-b.csv"))
```
